{{Quote|Admiral Pellaeon, this is Commander Dreyf. I have a preliminary report for you.|Commander Dreyf to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Pellaeon]]|<ref name="Specter of the Past">''[[Specter of the Past]]''</ref>}}
[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Dreyf''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Intelligence]] officer who served aboard the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Incredible. He actually broke into your private records. I would never have thought him capable of doing that. It must have been Dreyf's idea.|[[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Grodin Tierce (clone)|Tierce]] to [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra|Disra]]|<ref name="Vision of the Future">''[[Vision of the Future]]''</ref>}}
Loyal to [[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]], then-[[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]], Dreyf was tasked with investigating the misappropriation of funds in the records of the planet [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]] concerning [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vilim Disra]], [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Graemon]] (whom he referred to as "a snake"), and [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jaron Kyte]].

Dreyf later escorted Pellaeon to Disra's palace on [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] in order to confront the Moff concerning the misappropriated funds, which were found to have been channeled to the [[Cavrilhu Pirates]]. While in Disra's office, Dreyf acted under Pellaeon's orders and successfully broke into the Moff's desk, uncovering datacards with files that implicated Disra in many crimes against the Empire for which the corrupt politician would soon be arrested.

==Appearances==

*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}
